title: AN ACT APPROPRIATING THE NECESSARY FUNDS TO IMPLEMENT REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FIFTY-TWO HUNDRED FOUR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 17950 / 65 OG No. 40, 10495-A (October 6, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5473, June 21, 1969 ]

AN ACT APPROPRIATING THE NECESSARY FUNDS TO IMPLEMENT REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FIFTY-TWO HUNDRED FOUR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The following hums, or so much thereof as may be necessary, are hereby appropriated out of any funds in the National Treasury not otherwise appropriated, to defray the expenses of the Court of Appeals in implementing the provisions of Republic Act Numbered Fifty-two hundred four, entitled "An Act to amend Sections twenty-four, thirty-two, thirty-three, and thirty-seven of Republic Act Numbered Two hundred ninety-six, otherwise known as 'The Judiciary Act of 1948,' as amended, and for other purposes," which created two new divisions of the Court of Appeals for the fiscal year nineÂteen hundred sixty-nine.

I. Personal Services

March 1 to June 30, 1969 ( for four months)

1. Six Associate justices at P24,000

P48,000.00

2. Six private secretaries at P9,000

18,000.00

3. Six attorneys at P7,200

14,400.00

4. Six stenographers at P4,800

9,600.00

5. Six janitors-messengers at P2, 940

5,880.00

Total for personal services

P95,880.00

II. Maintenance and Other Operating Expenses

9,600.00

5. Six janitors-messengers at P2, 940

5,880.00

P95,880.00

II. Maintenance and Other Operating Expenses

1. Traveling expenses of Justices including reimbursement for the use of their privately owned automobiles in connection with their attendance at the Court Session commutable monthly, but not to exceed P200 per month

P4.800.00

2. Traveling- Expenses

17,280.00

3. Supplies and materials

15,320.00

4. Sundry expenses, including the repair and renovation of six (6) offices and rental for six cottages for the Associate Justices

50,000.00

P87,400.00

Equipment Outlay

IV. Special Purpose

P59,760.00

V. Summary

Total for personal services

P95,880.00

120,000.00

59,760.00

Total

P363,040.00

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1969.
